title: Large Fluid Tank
description:
Add some types of tanks, which can be combined vertically.
Tanks can hold Fluids and Potions.
body:
This mod adds a variety of tanks of some materials.
The Wood one can hold 4,000 mB in a block and the Star one can have about 1 billion mB.
The tanks can be connected vertically, so you can make a tower of fluids!

![](https://gist.github.com/Kotori316/8c426c7e1ea70856bf5f2545048c49a9/raw/aa04a21f3c5d2fec496dc73e3531b099ec33220c/2023-07-23_18.10.50.png)

## Downloads

You need **Scalable Cat's Force**([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalable-cats-force)) to run this mod. Both Forge and Fabric version require this library.

* Modrinth
  * [Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/large-fluid-tank/versions?l=forge)
  * [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/large-fluid-tank/versions?l=fabric)

I don't allow users to redistribute this mod unless in modpacks or I give the permission.

## Function

Place the tank and fill with Water Bucket. Then use empty Bucket to drain from the tank. Just it!

### Many kinds of fluid support

This mod support planform(Forge and Fabric) dependent fluid system, such as "FluidHandler - Forge" and "FluidVariant - fabric", so you can insert many kinds of fluid from other mods.

![](https://gist.github.com/Kotori316/8c426c7e1ea70856bf5f2545048c49a9/raw/aa04a21f3c5d2fec496dc73e3531b099ec33220c/3.png)

### Support of Potion

You can insert not only Fluids such as Water, but also Potions into the tanks.
![](https://gist.github.com/Kotori316/8c426c7e1ea70856bf5f2545048c49a9/raw/aa04a21f3c5d2fec496dc73e3531b099ec33220c/2023-07-17_19.17.41.png)
Just right click with bottle of Potion, then the tank will store Potion. To extract, interact with Empty Bottle.
